outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran war: US rescues 1 of 2 crew members from fighter jet downed over Iran
outlets.summary: CNN covers the dramatic rescue of one F-15E crew member by US special forces inside Iran, with a second still missing.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Iran downs a U.S. F-15 jet and hits Gulf refineries as the war rounds its 5th week
outlets.summary: NPR reports on the downed F-15E and Iran's retaliatory strikes on Gulf energy infrastructure as Trump escalates to bridge/power plant threats.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump urges Iran to make a deal after tallest bridge in Middle East collapses from US strikes
outlets.summary: Fox News frames B1 Bridge collapse as pressure on Iran to negotiate, while noting Iran threatens retaliation against US allies.

outlets.name: Daily Beast
outlets.headline: Frantic Search for Downed F-15 Airman as Iran Offers Bounty
outlets.summary: Daily Beast frames the F-15E loss as a 'humiliation for Trump' with Iran offering a bounty for the missing crew member.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 35 of US-Israeli attacks?
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera provides comprehensive Day 35 coverage including 100+ legal scholars condemning strikes as possible war crimes.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: Tehran fires at Israel as Trump warns US has not started 'destroying what is left' in Iran
outlets.summary: Euronews covers the escalation spiral: Iran fires at Israel while Trump threatens total infrastructure destruction.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Why Israelis Are Losing Faith in the Iran War
outlets.summary: Haaretz analysis: support for regime change goal dropped from 63% to 45.5%. Israelis questioning effectiveness of extended campaign.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: IDF kills Iranian ballistic missile chief Makram Atimi in Kermanshah strike
outlets.summary: JPost covers elimination of key Iranian missile commander and ongoing IDF strikes on 50 missile sites during Passover.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera (Iran coverage)
outlets.headline: Iran condemns US-Israeli 'moral collapse' after attacks on civilian sites
outlets.summary: Iran frames bridge/Pasteur Institute strikes as attacks on civilians. Araghchi: 'Every bridge will be built back stronger.'

outlets.name: Press TV / GlobalSecurity
outlets.headline: Mojtaba Khamenei urges nationwide reconstruction as Iran vows defiance
outlets.summary: Iranian state media focuses on reconstruction and defiance narrative. Pezeshkian appeals on Pasteur Institute destruction.
